semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't add comments unless it's not obvious why something is being done. If in doubt, don't comment.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes a comment only when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Make parallel MCP calls in the main conversation for speed.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already runs independent tool calls in parallel by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Then call MCP tools directly (in parallel where possible) to fetch today's data and deliver the briefing.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already runs independent tool calls in parallel by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: When modifying workouts via /adjust, always show proposed changes and wait for user confirmation before writing to the calendar
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already asks before destructive operations by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: When editing CLAUDE.md, use the minimum words and sentences needed to convey 100% of the meaning.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers with length matching the task by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: After completing each planned task, run tests and commit before moving to the next task.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done and tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Optimize test execution speed. Run independent tests in parallel (multi-process/multi-thread, async, or parallel runner).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already runs independent tool calls in parallel by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Explain why, not what. Code already shows what it does — comments should capture intent, constraints, and non-obvious decisions.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain what the code does and only writes comments when the why is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Comment business rules, workarounds, and "why this approach over the obvious one" — context that can't be inferred from code alone.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes a comment when the why is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Default mindset: finish the job.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done and does not batch, implying a finished state.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Agents should not leave uncommitted changes dangling on `master`/`main`.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done and does not batch, implying a clean working tree.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do this proactively when work is complete.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: ALWAYS stop and fix Write/Edit hook errors immediately before writing the next file
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as done, tests incrementally, and identifies root causes for debugging.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do NOT attempt to fix the code based only on quick-mode output — always get debug output first
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already identifies root causes rather than bypassing safety checks and investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Fix ALL encountered errors immediately, even pre-existing ones unrelated to your current task

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Plan first for non-trivial tasks (3+ steps) — use plan mode

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Verify before done — prove it works with tests, logs, demonstrations
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally and marks tasks complete as soon as done.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Make every change as simple as possible.
